calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-26-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-28-2015 Continued To Oct-26-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Duncan Hromadka (via court call) for (petitioners) Mark Hurst & Anne Hurst Hardock.

The Court asked if copies of the receipts have been filed. Mr. Hromadka stated that they have not but will be submitted with the order and that all matters can be handled today if the court will accept the receipts with the order. The Court stated that it will continue the matter for the receipts to be filed and that the matter will be under submission as of that date. The accounting petition was continued to October 26, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Chien. (Not Reported)
